UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF MAY-04-2021 FOR HEARING ON PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT (PROVE-UP HEARING) - CONTINUED TO JUN-17-2021 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 514 FOR FURTHER DEFAULT PROVE-UP HEARING ON THE ISSUES OF (1) CALCULATION OF INTEREST, AND (2) ATTORNEY FEES. THE COURT IS INCLINED TO GRANT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST IF, AT THE NEXT CALLING OF THE CASE, THOSE TWO SPECIFIC ISSUES ARE ADDRESSED TO THE COURT'S SATISFACTION. CHRISTOPHER GUERRERO, ESQ. APPEARED FOR PLAINTIFF BRUNO'S PIZZA AND RESTAURANT, LLC. ABDULLAH AWADALLA, A/K/A "MIKE," THE FORMER OWNER OF BRUNO'S PIZZA AND RESTAURANT, WAS PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANTS MUNIR ADEM AMIR OR MENSOR A. AMIR. PLAINTIFF TO PROVIDE DEFENDANTS WITH NOTICE OF THE CONTINUED HEARING DATE. WITNESS'S APPEARANCE IS WAIVED FOR THE JUNE 17TH HEARING DATE. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY IRENE TOFFT, CSR #12933. EMAIL: ITOFFT@SFTC.ORG. JUDGE: MURLENE J. RANDLE. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. (D514).

COUNSEL HAS NOT PROVIDED THE COURT WITH SUFFICIENT DOCUMENTATION IN SUPPORT OF THE REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY FEE & COSTS. THE COURT IS SATISFIED WITH THE TESTIMONY OF MR. AWADALLA, AND WITH COUNSEL'S OFFER OF PROOF. THEREFORE MR. AWADALLA'S APPEARANCE IS WAIVED AT THE NEXT CALLING OF THE CASE. CHRISTOPHER GUERREO, ESQ. APPEARED WITH ABDULLAH AWADALLA, WHO WAS PRESENT AS OWNER OF AND CUSTODIAN OF RECORDS FOR PLAINTIFF BRUNO'S PIZZA AND RESTAURANT. BOTH MESSRS. GUERRERO AND AWADALLA APPEARED VIA ZOOM FOR THIS MORNING'S HEARING. PROCEEDINGS RECORDED BY FOR THE RECORD. JUDGE: MURLENE J. RANDLE. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. (D514)

UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF AUG-24-2021 FOR FURTHER DEFAULT PROVE-UP HEARING ON THE SOLE ISSUE OF ATTORNEY FEES & COSTS - GRANTED. THE COURT HAS REVIEWED THE SECOND SUPPLEMENTAL DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL CHRISTOPHER GUERRERO IN SUPPORT OF THE APPLICATION FOR DEFAULT JUDGMENT, FILED WITH THE CLERK'S OFFICE ON 07/27/2021. JUDGMENT SHALL ENTER IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF BRUNOS PIZZA AND RESTAURANT LLC, AND AGAINST DEFAULTED DEFENDANTS MUNIR ADEM AMIR AND MENSOR A. AMIR AS FOLLOWS: DAMAGES/PRINCIPAL - $129,940.00; PREJUDGMENT INTEREST - $7276.00; ATTORNEY FEES - $7,778.70; AND COSTS IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,317.00, FOR A TOTAL OF $146,311.70. COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF SHALL PREPARE THE PROPOSED JUDGMENT AND SUBMIT SAME TO THE COURT FOR REVIEW AND SIGNATURE. NO APPEARANCE. NOT REPORTED. JUDGE: MURLENE J. RANDLE. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. (D514)

Notice Of Motion
Off Calendar Aug-24-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day having been continued from July 8, 2021 for further Default Prove-Up Hearing on the issue of attorney fees & costs.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Proceedings Not Reported.

Christopher Guerreo, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bruno's Pizza and Restaurant.
Abdullah Awadalla, Custodian of Records for plaintiff Bruno's Pizza and Restaurent, was placed under oath and testified.
Both Messrs. Guerreo and Awadalla who was present as owner of and custodian of records for plaintiff Bruno's Pizza and Restaurant. Both Messrs. Guerrero and Awadalla appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
Adam Brumage, Esq. appeared for plaintiff JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A.
Samira Peacock, Associate Vendor Management Analyst for plainitff, was placed under oath and testified.
Both Mr. Brumage and Ms. Peacock appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Deepti Jain.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Common Counts was filed October 14, 2020, and personally served on defendant Deepti Jain on January 11, 2021.
Default as to defendant Deepti Jain was entered on April 1, 2021.
DOE defendants not named in plaintiff's complaint.

Plaintiff JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A. submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Account Statements.........................................................ID/EVID
Exhibit 2: Electronic Record of Account Application...................................ID/EVID
Exhibit 3: Carholder Agreement adn Changes in Terms...................................ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A., and against the defaulted defendant Deepti Jain, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $26,683.49.
Prejudgment Interest - Waived.
Attorney Fees - Waived.
Costs - Waived.

Total - $26,683.49.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibits.

Uncontested Calendar of Jul-08-2021 Notice Of Motion for Default Prove-Up Hearing - Continued to Aug-24-2021 at 9:00 am in Dept. 514 for further default prove-up hearing on attorney fees & costs. Counsel has not provided the Court with sufficient documentation in support of the request for attorney fee & costs. The Court is satisfied with the testimony of Mr. Awadalla, and with counsel's offer of proof. Mr. Awadalla's appearance is waived at the next calling of the case. Proceedings recorded by For The Record. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: K. Dougherty. (D514)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-16-2021 Continued To Nov-03-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion
Off Calendar Jul-08-2021 Continued To Aug-24-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants Munir Adem Amir and Mensor A. Adem.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Proceedings recorded by For The Record.

Christopher Guerreo, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bruno's Pizza and Restaurant.
Abdullah Awadalla, Custodian of Records for plaintiff Bruno's Pizza and Restaurent, was placed under oath and testified.
Both Messrs. Guerreo and Awadalla, who was present as owner of and custodian of records for plaintiff Bruno's Pizza and Restaurant, appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendants Munir Adem Amir or Mensor A. Adem.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Common Counts was filed March 2, 2020, and personally on defendant Munir Adem Amir on May 1, 2020.
Substitute service of plaintiff's Summons, Complaint and accompanying documents on defendant Mensor A. Amir aoocurred on May 1, 2020, and was effectuated on may 14, 2020.
Default as to defendant Munir Adem Amir was entered on June 4, 2020.
Default as to defendant Mensor A. amir was entered on June 16, 2020.
DOE defendants were dismissed July 20, 2020.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Brunos Pizza & Restaurant LLC, and against the defaulted defendants Munir Adem Amir and Mensor A. Adem, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $129,940.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $7,276.00.
